name: Apple-Cheddar Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Sharp Cheddar Cheese; Coarse Grate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar together until well blended.
3. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; mix lightly.
5. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the shortening mixture.
6. Add the apples, pecans, and cheese, mixing well after each addition.
7. Gradually add the milk, stirring until all ingredients are just moistened.
8. Grease muffin pans and fill cups 2/3 full with batter.
9. Dip apple slices in melted butter and then into cinnamon-sugar.
10. Press one apple slice onto the top of each muffin.
11. Sprinkle lightly with cinnamon-sugar.
12. Bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
